Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.assetDiversificationDescription: See how diverse your holdings are based on the class, market sector or country of each asset.

topPerformers.topPerformersDescription: View the investments that are performing the best across all of your portfolios.

goalProgression.title: Goal Progression
goalProgression.goalSuccessfullyMet: Your goal of {targetValue, number} ({userCurrency}) has been reached!

callToAction.description: Track your stocks, ETFs and cryptocurrency holdings across all your portfolios, and learn about investing strategies through interactive guides.

realTimeTracking.title: Real-time Portfolio Tracking
realTimeTracking.description: Monitor and analyse all of your stock, ETF and cryptocurrency holdings in one place with live updates and intuitive performance metrics.

interactiveLearning.title: Interactive Learning
interactiveLearning.description: Discover core concepts and learn about investing strategies through interactive and bite-sized guides.

goalTracking.title: Goal Tracking and Progression
goalTracking.description: Set a financial goal and track your progress towards it based on the real-time value of your overall portfolio.

manageInvestments.title: Manage and track your investments
manageInvestments.description: Create multiple portfolios to organise your investments and track their performance over time. View detailed analytics and insights, such as asset allocation, risk level, and returns, to gain a deeper understanding of your investments and make informed decisions.

monitorPortfolios.title: Monitor your portfolios at a glance
monitorPortfolios.description: Use the dashboard to get a quick view of your overall portfolio performance, including the total value of your investments, overall change over different time periods, your top performing investments and asset diversification.

discoverTrendingAssets.title: Discover trending assets
discoverTrendingAssets.description: Explore a wide range of assets, including stocks, ETFs, and cryptocurrencies. Use the markets page to discover assets that have seen significant gains or losses or activity in the past 24 hours.

viewDetailedAssetInfo.title: View detailed asset information
viewDetailedAssetInfo.description: View comprehensive details about each asset, including historical performance, the current price and the industry and sector it is in. View current holdings of the asset and add it to a portfolio directly from the asset details page.

learnInvestingStrategies.title: Learn about investing strategies
learnInvestingStrategies.description: Explore investing strategies, such as compounding and cost-averaging, to learn how you can grow your wealth over time. Gain an understanding of what these are, why they matter and the impact they can have on investment performance through interactive simulations and visualisations.
